Python Integration
==================

For advanced data analysis and custom interfaces, the BlackPill I/O Carrier can communicate directly with Python scripts.

Use Cases


* **Data Logging:** Saving encoder positions to CSV files.
* **Real-time Plotting:** Visualizing sensor data using Matplotlib.
* **Configuration Tools:** A Python-based GUI to set board parameters via Serial.

This documentation is divided into specialized sections to cover every aspect of the system:

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: API Reference

   ../examples/dro_hal/hardware_abstraction_layer
